CustomField.description: FTE posts - No. of business, public service, engineering & technology professionals (SOC Codes 21-24)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology professionals? For example: R&D, IT, legal, finance, project management or chartered professionals (SOC Codes 21-24)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - No. Bus/Pub/Eng/Tech Prof
